summary: Re-testing Mutual Hold Trade Phase 3 frontend after /trades route fix. All previously blocked features now accessible and working correctly. TradesPage renders at /trades, TradeDetailModal opens with Pay Hold button, Hold Status section shows payment status per party, trade cards show shield icons and hold badges.
passed_tests: TradesPage renders at /trades (no redirect to /honeypot) - FIXED
TradesPage shows 'My Trades' heading with Active/History tabs
12 active trade cards visible with proper styling
3 Shield icons (data-testid='hold-shield-icon') on HOLD_PENDING trade cards
3 Hold badges (data-testid='trade-hold-badge') showing mutual hold amounts ($75, $60)
3 'Pay hold' action badges on HOLD_PENDING trades where user hasn't paid
TradeDetailModal opens when clicking a trade card
Pay Hold button (data-testid='pay-hold-btn') visible with text 'Pay $75 Hold'
Hold Status section (data-testid='hold-status-section') shows payment status per party
MUTUAL HOLD header visible in TradeDetailModal
Shows '@trader2 — Waiting' and '@demo (you) — Waiting' status indicators
Shows 'Both parties must pay the $75 hold to start shipping.' message
Shows refund policy: 'Fully reversed within 24 hours of confirmed delivery. The hold is not subject to platform fees.'
FAQ page 'What is a Mutual Hold Trade?' entry present and expandable
FAQ Trades section shows detailed Mutual Hold explanation
Confirmation UI code review: 'Yes, everything looks good' button (data-testid='confirm-receipt-btn') present
Confirmation UI code review: 'There's an issue' button (data-testid='open-dispute-btn') present
unable_to_test_live: Confirmation UI buttons (no CONFIRMING status trades in database) - Code verified correct
critical_code_review_comments: App.js line 144-148 now correctly renders TradesPage instead of redirect - FIXED
TradeCard component has correct data-testid='hold-shield-icon' attribute
TradeCard component has correct data-testid='trade-hold-badge' attribute
TradeDetailModal has correct data-testid='pay-hold-btn' for Pay Hold button
TradeDetailModal has correct data-testid='hold-status-section' for hold status
Confirmation UI (CONFIRMING status) has correct data-testid='confirm-receipt-btn' and 'open-dispute-btn'

success_rate.frontend: 100% (17 tests passed, 1 unable to test live but code verified)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test trades - 12 active trades including 3 HOLD_PENDING status
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Mutual Hold Trade Phase 3 UI features verified working. /trades route now renders TradesPage correctly. TradeDetailModal opens from trade cards and shows Pay Hold button, Hold Status section with per-party payment status. To test Confirmation UI live, would need a trade in CONFIRMING status. Shield icons and hold badges display correctly on trade cards. FAQ has 'What is a Mutual Hold Trade?' entry with detailed explanation.

fix_verified.issue: /trades route was redirecting to /honeypot (iteration_39 critical issue)
fix_verified.fix: App.js line 144 now renders <TradesPage /> instead of <Navigate to='/honeypot' />
